value.rationale: The claim describes an "Agent view" feature for dispatching and monitoring background sessions via a `claude agents` command. The page is about "Agent teams" — coordinating multiple Claude Code sessions/teammates. It describes spawning teammates, an agent panel, display modes, and natural-language coordination, but there is no mention of an "Agent view," dispatching/monitoring "background sessions," or a `claude agents` command. The mechanisms described (spawning teammates via natural language, agent panel) do not match the named offering. No verbatim text on the page describes the claimed feature.
